samples.label: Path A — shipment tracking + delivery window policy

submission.subject: Tracking shipment SH-2026-4471 and confirming delivery window
submission.description: Hello Supply Chain team, our shipment SH-2026-4471 left our warehouse on 2026-04-22 against PO-2026-892. Could you confirm the standard delivery window for inbound steel shipments, and where we should upload the eway bill / lorry receipt? The truck registration is MH-12-DK-9821.

samples.label: Path B — partial-dispatch question (no clear KB fact)

submission.subject: Can we split the dispatch for PO-2026-1003 into two consignments?
submission.description: We are running short on truck availability this week. Would it be acceptable to split the dispatch for PO-2026-1003 into two consignments — 300 units this Friday and 200 units next Monday? If yes, do you need separate delivery challans, and does it affect our payment cycle?
